O. 1044 (E).вАФIn exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 1 of the Right of Children to Free and Compulsory Education (Amendment) Act, 2019 (1 of 2019), the Central Government hereby appoints the 1st March, 2019, as the date on which the provisions of the said Act shall come into force. [F.No. 1-3/2017-EE-4/IS-3] MANEESH GARG, Jt. Secy.
